method.chapter_boundary: Use anchored H2 '第 X 章' headings with Arabic numerals, an optional inserted letter suffix such as 6A, or Chinese numerals; only fall back to anchored H1 chapters when a textbook has no matching H2 chapter. M05 split chapter files are aggregated under their stable compatibility index.
method.role_detection: Match section headings within each chapter. Whole-file keyword presence is not used to claim chapter coverage.
method.content_type_detection: Use explicit textbook-content HTML comments, supported heading tags, or content type quote metadata. Chapter markers override a document default. Missing, unknown, or conflicting explicit types remain unclassified; titles and prose keywords are not used to guess a type.
method.archive_detection: Any textbook below a 99_归档 path is archived.

summary.role_coverage_scope: Explicitly classified instructional chapters only. Unclassified and non-instructional chapters are excluded from this denominator.
summary.interpretation: Role coverage means an explicit role-labelled section was found inside the same chapter. The primary role_coverage denominator contains only explicitly classified instructional chapters; all_active_role_coverage preserves the earlier whole-scope view. A missing section is a review candidate, not proof that the concept is absent from prose.
